sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, description VARCHAR NOT NULL, amount DECIMAL(10,2));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, description, amount) VALUES (1, 'Test item', 10.00), (2, 'Another test item', NULL), (3, 'Boundary case', 0.00);
SELECT string_output_string(string_output()) AS output FROM (SELECT description FROM test_table WHERE amount IS NOT NULL) AS subquery;
SELECT id, string_output_string(string_output()) AS combined FROM (SELECT id, description || ' has amount: ' || amount AS description FROM test_table) AS inner_query WHERE id = 1;
SELECT string_output_string(string_output()) FROM test_table AS t1 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_table AS t2 WHERE t1.amount = t2.amount AND t2.id = 3);
SELECT string_output_string(string_output()) FROM test_table GROUP BY description HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
SELECT id, string_output_string(string_output()) AS output FROM test_table WHERE amount IS NULL OR description = 'Boundary case' ORDER BY output DESC;
SELECT MAX(amount), string_output_string(string_output()) FROM (SELECT amount FROM test_table) AS derived WHERE MAX(amount) > 0;
WITH cte AS (SELECT id, string_output_string(string_output()) AS output FROM test_table) SELECT id FROM cte WHERE output IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE secondary_table (reference INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES test_table(id), notes VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO secondary_table (reference, notes) VALUES (1, 'First note'), (2, NULL);
SELECT string_output_string(string_output()) AS final_output FROM secondary_table WHERE reference IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE amount < 10);
